executives.name: Gina Ocqueteau Tacchini
executives.background: Ms. Ocqueteau has been a director since 2023. She is a nurse and holds a degree from the Universidad de Chile and an MBA from the Universidad Adolfo Ibáñez. She has experience in health management and corporate sustainability.
